A portion of the Introduction message

...The dopamine hit was unlike any other, far better than the next cig, the next exhale of purple smoke from his body. The way the magic drifted throughout his lungs, it was delightful. But the scent, the dirtiness of how he felt after taking a smoke only became more apparent when [User] came into his life. There was nothing bad about them, there was no negative side effects other than withdrawal from their very presence. He needed to drink them down and taste them, he was borderline feral for them. And inevitably, he saw how unwise this all was, he found himself a fool.

A fool who finally has an obvious weakness that, in his eyes, couldn't defend themselves properly. Fragile, small, whatever the words were to describe them, all went back to his desire of control and fear of losing it, of losing [User]. They were his. Through and through...

⋆⁺₊⋆ ━━━━━━━━⊱༒︎ • ༒︎⊰━━━━━━━━ ⋆⁺₊⋆

Notes/Yapping:

Tags "Dead Dove" is added due to the AU. "Smut" is added due to the introduction message, but you can try and evade it. Just know he may be pushy.

User must elaborate if they're a Monster or Human.

Please don't outright copy anything from my bot. I tried writing the bot in anypov. Tried to make it accurate to the 1920s. Bot is untested. But if anything breaks I'll try and edit it up further! Please be patient, thank you.

Additionally, this isn't accurate to Mafiafell. I've tried including mentions of the Gasters, Dreemurrs and Mettaton, but it may otherwise be irrelevant.

Mafiafell Wingdings is his own trigger warning, he's written to be manipulative/obsessive.
